title: upload api excel file parsing and candidate record creation
description: Test POST /api/upload with a valid Excel file containing required columns to verify successful parsing, S3 storage, DynamoDB record creation, and correct response with jobId and candidate preview.

title: screening api ai powered candidate scoring and classification
description: Test POST /api/screen with valid jobId, jobDetails, and weightage to verify AI resume fetching, OCR fallback for scanned PDFs, role classification, weighted scoring, and correct ranked candidate response.

title: email api send interview invitations with success and failure counts
description: Test POST /api/email/interview with candidate list and interview details to verify AI-generated email sending via AWS SES, handling of malformed emails, and correct sent and failed counts in response.

title: pipeline api create and retrieve candidate pipeline status
description: Test POST /api/pipeline/create with jobId and candidateIds to initialize pipeline, then GET /api/pipeline/status/:jobId to verify rounds, candidates grouped by round, and pipeline statistics.

title: dashboard api health check and global recruitment statistics
description: Test GET /api/health to verify API health status including downstream service availability, and GET /api/dashboard/stats to retrieve global recruitment statistics with in-progress job counts.
